target_files: new JSON adapter files; src/RpcRequest.*; src/RpcResponse.*
acceptance: RPC and session JSON can be represented through Boost.JSON without changing supported public response shapes.
notes: Keep conversion narrow until old parser deletion is safe.

acceptance: JSON-RPC request parsing uses Boost.JSON and preserves supported error behavior.
notes: Invalid JSON error mapping must stay deterministic.

acceptance: JSON-RPC responses serialize through Boost.JSON with stable field names and value types.
notes: Avoid incidental ordering tests unless public output requires order.

acceptance: Custom JSON parser/writer code is deleted or reduced to non-JSON internal variant ownership only.
RPC JSON tests pass and stale custom JSON parser scans match final ownership.
notes: Boost.JSON version comes from Boost baseline.
